---
name: Change request
about: Request a change to help us improve
title: '[CHANGE] title'
labels: change request
assignees: dylan-bakr
---

**Describe the change**

A clear and concise description of the change and how it differs from the current functionality.

**Expected behavior**

A clear and concise description of what you expect to happen.

**Additional context**

Deadlines, nice-to-haves, etc.
